generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for actuation in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear mechanism in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for actuation in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring angular position and velocity for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionVelocityData
]

instance SecondaryEncoderBehindGearbox : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox measuring angular position for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
]

instance CurrentSensorsInputCurrentIM : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring input current (I_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorsInputCurrentIMData
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Time series data of angular position and velocity from motor encoder streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoderBehindGearbox
    base:desc "Time series data of angular position from secondary encoder behind gearbox streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance CurrentSensorsInputCurrentIMData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensorsInputCurrentIM
    base:desc "Time series data of input current (I_M) measured by current sensors streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current (I_M) data from current sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorsInputCurrentIMData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data derived from current and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [

]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data from MATLAB Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data from MATLAB Simulink models"

]

]

]

]

]

]

]

instance MotionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for motion control parameters"
]

instance MotionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlInsight
]

]

]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

]

instance MetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

    base:desc "Metadata information for the digital twin components"

    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology for problem identification, asset analysis, use/create models, data identification concrete realization of Digital Shadow Reference Model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    base:contains FirstAxisMABIMAX100Robot, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGear, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoderBehindGearbox, CurrentSensorsInputCurrentIM
]

]

]
